narrative:
Cols 69-A (precinct in Franklin County) has 2,483 registered voters, with 67.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 14.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 18.7%, a modest Democratic lean of 4.6 percentage points.
